title: [InstCombine] Avoid to create bitreverse.i1 for or of trunc to i1
test_patch:
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/or.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/or.ll
index 95f89e4ce11cd..a5cc933278982 100644
--- a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/or.ll
+++ b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/or.ll
@@ -2035,3 +2035,15 @@ define i32 @or_xor_and_commuted3(i32 %x, i32 %y, i32 %z) {
   %or1 = or i32 %xor, %yy
   ret i32 %or1
 }
+
+define i1 @or_truncs(i8 %x) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: @or_truncs(
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = and i8 [[X:%.*]], 1
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[OR1:%.*]] = icmp ne i8 [[TMP1]], 0
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[OR1]]
+;
+  %trunc1 = trunc i8 %x to i1
+  %trunc2 = trunc i8 %x to i1
+  %or1 = or i1 %trunc1, %trunc2
+  ret i1 %or1
+}

tests.test_body:
target datalayout = "e-p:32:32:32-i1:8:8-i8:8:8-i16:16:16-i32:32:32-i64:32:64-f32:32:32-f64:32:64-v64:64:64-v128:128:128-a0:0:64-f80:128:128-n32:64"

define i1 @or_truncs(i8 %x) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @or_truncs(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TRUNC:%.*]] = trunc i8 [[X:%.*]] to i1
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[OR1:%.*]] = call i1 @llvm.bitreverse.i1(i1 [[TRUNC]])
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i1 [[OR1]]
  %trunc1 = trunc i8 %x to i1
  %trunc2 = trunc i8 %x to i1
  %or1 = or i1 %trunc1, %trunc2
  ret i1 %or1
}

target datalayout = "e-p:32:32:32-i1:8:8-i8:8:8-i16:16:16-i32:32:32-i64:32:64-f32:32:32-f64:32:64-v64:64:64-v128:128:128-a0:0:64-f80:128:128-n32:64"

define i32 @or_xor_and_commuted3(i32 %x, i32 %y, i32 %z) {
; CHECK-LABEL: @or_xor_and_commuted3(
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[YY:%.*]] = mul i32 [[Y:%.*]], [[Y]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    [[OR1:%.*]] = or i32 [[X:%.*]], [[YY]]
; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[OR1]]
  %yy = mul i32 %y, %y
  %zz = mul i32 %z, %z
  %and = and i32 %zz, %yy
  %xor = xor i32 %and, %x
  %or1 = or i32 %xor, %yy
  ret i32 %or1
}
